zh.lifeSummary: Richard Plantagenet於1411年出生在英國。他和Cecily Neville至少有1個女兒。他去世於1460年在他的家鄉享年49歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Richard Plantagenet于1411年出生在英国。他和Cecily Neville至少有1个女儿。他去世于1460年在他的家乡享年49岁。

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: Richard Plantagenet was born in 1411, in England. He had at least 1 daughter with Cecily Neville. He died in 1460, in his hometown, at the age of 49.

fr.lifeSummary: Richard Plantagenet est né en 1411, à Angleterre. Il a eu au moins 1 fille avec Cecily Neville. Il est décédé en 1460, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 49 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Richard Plantagenet wurde 1411 in England geboren. Er hatte mit Cecily Neville mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1460 im Alter von 49 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Richard Plantagenet è nato il nel 1411 nel England. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia con Cecily Neville. Morì nel 1460, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 49 anni.

ja.London, Middlesex, England: イギリスミッドレセックスロンドン
ja.lifeSummary: Richard Plantagenetは1411年にイギリスで生まれた。彼はCecily Nevilleとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1460年に故郷で49歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Plantagenet(은)는 1411년 영국에서 태어났다. 그는 Cecily Neville(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1460년 그의 고향에서 49세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Richard Plantagenet nasceu em 1411, em Inglaterra. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha com Cecily Neville. Ele faleceu em 1460, em sua cidade natal, com 49 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Richard Plantagenet родился в 1411 г. в местности Англия. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Cecily Neville. Он умер в 1460 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 49 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Richard Plantagenet nació en 1411, en Inglaterra. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Cecily Neville. Murió en 1460, en su pueblo, a la edad de 49 años.

th.London, Middlesex, England: โลนโดน, มิดดลส์เอกซ์, เอิงแลนด์
